actions.label: Preview
actions.description: Deploy the current app to its standard preview target.

actions.label: Deploy Prod
actions.description: Release the current app to production.

actions.label: Verify
actions.description: Run the release-safety checks before shipping.

actions.label: Maintenance / Advanced
actions.description: Open less common deploy variants and maintenance commands.

groups.label: Release
groups.description: Approved preview and production deploy paths.

groups.label: Verify
groups.description: Explicit validation entrypoints before release work.

targets.label: Fitness Preview
targets.description: Deploy Fitness to the standard Vercel preview target.
notes: Runs the existing preview deploy wrapper from _stack.
The approved script already performs fresh-state verification.

targets.label: Fitness Preview With Logs
targets.description: Deploy Fitness preview and keep Vercel logs attached.
notes: Runs the preview deploy path that keeps Vercel logs attached.
The approved script already performs fresh-state verification.

targets.label: Fitness Preview Prebuilt
targets.description: Deploy a prebuilt Fitness preview for remote-build isolation.
notes: Uses the prebuilt preview path for remote-build isolation.
The approved script already performs build-time verification.

targets.label: Fitness Prod
targets.description: Release Fitness to production using the standard deploy path.
notes: Promotes the current Fitness state to production.
The approved script already performs fresh-state verification before Vercel.
After the launcher's typed confirmation gate, the downstream Vercel deploy runs non-interactively.

targets.label: Fitness Prod Prebuilt
targets.description: Release a prebuilt Fitness artifact to production.
notes: Uses the prebuilt production path for remote-build isolation.
The approved script already performs build-time verification before Vercel.

targets.label: Mazer Preview
targets.description: Deploy Mazer to the standard preview target.
notes: Runs the existing Mazer preview deploy wrapper from _stack.
The approved script already performs owner-author preflight and local verification.

targets.label: Mazer Prod
targets.description: Release Mazer to production using the standard deploy path.
notes: Promotes the current Mazer state to production.
The approved script already performs owner-author preflight and local verification.

targets.label: Trove Preview
targets.description: Deploy Trove to the standard preview target.
notes: Runs the current Trove preview deploy wrapper from _stack.
The approved script performs Trove Vercel identity preflight and repo-local verification before Vercel.

targets.label: Trove Preview Prebuilt
targets.description: Deploy a prebuilt Trove preview for remote-build isolation.
notes: Uses the prebuilt preview path for remote-build isolation.
The approved script performs Trove Vercel identity preflight and build-time verification before Vercel.

targets.label: Trove Prod
targets.description: Release Trove to production using the standard deploy path.
notes: Promotes the current Trove state to production.
The approved script performs Trove Vercel identity preflight and repo-local verification before Vercel.

targets.label: Trove Prod Prebuilt
targets.description: Release a prebuilt Trove artifact to production.
notes: Uses the prebuilt production path for remote-build isolation.
The approved script performs Trove Vercel identity preflight and build-time verification before Vercel.

targets.label: Fitness Verify
targets.description: Run the standard Fitness verify entrypoint.
notes: Runs the standard Fitness strict verify entrypoint from _stack.

targets.label: Fitness Verify Clean
targets.description: Run the clean-state Fitness verification used before release work.
notes: Runs clean-state verification before deploy-related work.

targets.label: Mazer Verify
targets.description: Run Mazer lint, test, and build before release work.
notes: Runs the current lint, test, and build preflight for Mazer.

targets.label: Trove Verify
targets.description: Run Trove lint and build before release work.
notes: Runs the standard Trove repo-local verify entrypoint from _stack.

targets.label: Trove Deploy Preflight
targets.description: Check the pinned Trove Vercel project identity before any deploy.
notes: Checks the pinned Trove Vercel project identity before any preview or production deploy.

targets.label: Fitness Doctor
targets.description: Check Vercel identity and Fitness environment visibility.
notes: Checks current Vercel identity and targeted Fitness environment visibility.

targets.label: Fitness Disconnect Vercel Git
targets.description: Disconnect the current Fitness Vercel Git integration.
notes: Disconnects the current Fitness Vercel Git integration.

targets.label: Mazer Deploy Preflight
targets.description: Check the required owner Git identity before any Mazer deploy.
notes: Checks the required owner Git identity before any Mazer deploy.
